plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

Todos los cambios notables en Don Cheli SDD Framework.

Formato basado en [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).

plugins.prepareCmd: echo -n ${nextRelease.version} > VERSION && echo -n ${nextRelease.version} > scripts/.claude/don-cheli/VERSION && sed -i 's/"version": "[^"]*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' package.json scripts/generar-config.sh && sed -i 's/VERSION="[^"]*"/VERSION="${nextRelease.version}"/' scripts/instalar.sh scripts/.claude/don-cheli/scripts/instalar.sh && sed -i 's/version-[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/version-${nextRelease.version}/g' README.md README.es.md README.pt.md && sed -i 's/versión-[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/versión-${nextRelease.version}/g' README.es.md && sed -i 's/versão-[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/versão-${nextRelease.version}/g' README.pt.md && sed -i 's/v[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]* — Open Source/v${nextRelease.version} — Open Source/g' docs/index.html
